DP.447.0000:
Feel free to take a power nap in
that bed.\f
As you can see, this lodge is beat
up. Do what you like here.
DP.447.0001:
I don’t have Thick Fat like some
Pokémon, so I have to bundle up\r
in clothes to keep warm.
DP.447.0002:
It’s a bed...
Want to take a rest?
DP.447.0003:
[0103,0000] quickly fell asleep
in the bed...\f
DP.447.0004:
[0103,0000] and the Pokémon
became fully healed from the rest!
